intro.summary: Learn the Bible in 52 weeks. This study covers Jacob's journey, his vision at Bethel, and the covenant events shaping Israel's future...
intro.instructions: How it works: Read daily, listen to audio, and meet weekly in your HomeGroup.

Torah: Deuteronomy 21:15 | The Right of the Firstborn
Deuteronomy 23:1 | Those Excluded from the Assembly
Deuteronomy 23:9 | Sanitary, Ritual, and Humanitarian Precepts
Deuteronomy 24:1 | Laws concerning Marriage and Divorce
Prophets: Isaiah 54:1 | Our Husband is Our Maker
Writings: 1Sa 16:1 | Saul is rejected and Samuel is sent to the new king over Israel
Gospels: Luke 23 | Jesus/ Yeshua Delivered to Pilate
Letters: James (Jacob) 5 | The example of the prophets

bible_text.first_verse: There are few ideal families in the Bible. Jacob's certainly wasn't…
bible_text.content: Jacob's story reveals the struggle between flesh and spirit, and how God redeems broken circumstances through covenant promises...

commentary.quote: There are few ideal families in the Bible. Jacob's certainly wasn't…
commentary.content: Jacob's story reveals the struggle between flesh and spirit, and how God redeems broken circumstances through covenant promises...

deeper_learning.quote: Explore the prophetic connections between Jacob's ladder and the Temple Mount. This passage unveils YHVH's sovereignty beyond time and space...

sections.aleph_tav: Key occurrences of את reveal divine fingerprints in the text, marking significant covenantal moments...
